title: Rivian Q2 2024 Earnings Summary
text: Rivian reported Q2 2024 earnings with revenue of $1.158 billion, which beat analyst expectations of $1.1 billion. EPS loss was $1.13 per share, better than projected $1.21 loss per share. CEO RJ Scaringe stated the quarter was defining for the company, highlighting successful plant upgrades and the launch of second-generation R1 vehicles. He emphasized that platform modifications helped reduce material and manufacturing costs, while simultaneously improving performance. Rivian stock experienced volatility in after-hours trading following the earnings announcement, initially spiking before declining and eventually stabilizing. The company announced a proposed joint venture with Volkswagen Group, which leadership credits to their industry-leading technology stack.
